title: NEEDLE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors. In addition to safer injection supplies, participants can receive counseling, safer sex information and supplies, free and anonymous HIV testing and Hepatitis C testing, as well as other drug treatment referrals. Outside In's syringe exchange policy is a one for one (1:1) program, meaning users get an even exchange for the amount of syringes they bring in, however no one will be turned away for not having returns. 1219 SW Main Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 535-3826 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3826 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID or proof of date of birth LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Safe Sex Supplies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES
